issues.title: Hub start action unavailable (8 failed attempts)
issues.description: Visual playtester could not start a run because start controls were missing from hub in playtest mode.
issues.suggestedFix: Ensure hub run-start controls are mounted/visible in playtest mode and expose a resilient start action.

issues.title: Hub rendered with no visible interactive controls (10 steps)
issues.description: No visible data-testid controls appeared on the hub during the visual run, blocking click-path verification.
issues.suggestedFix: Ensure hub run-start controls are mounted/visible in playtest mode and expose a resilient start action.
